payload.answer: Which existing memory should be rewritten? The new statement uses an ambiguous reference (“the other one”), so I need the target memory or the two options it refers to before offering a rewrite.
repair_options: Select the existing memory to rewrite, then replace it with: “He prefers the other one.”
Clarify the reference before rewriting, e.g. “He prefers [specific option] over [specific option].”
Cancel the rewrite and do not change any memory.
